text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hey, stop that at once! Why do you<n>keep staring
at me?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I see the problem! Yer not smilin'<n>enough, Air
Groove!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, smile! Ain't there a Japanese<n>sayin' about
fortune coming to the<n>laughin' mates?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's not quite correct. Try again.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sure thing! Fortune comes to the dancin'<n>plates!
